subcodes.first_line: O ye two pilgrims to the sanctuary of the Concourse on High! Your letter was received, and from it was learned of the joy that thrilled your hearts upon beholding the countenance of the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو زائر مطاف ملا اعلی نامه شما رسید و اهتزاز قلب شما از دیدار روی یاران
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for forgiveness
